title: Pre-compaction-5: Mistbound (0e27cc) — owner re-engaged marshal post-M1-merge; resume-as-marshal post-compaction; napkin highlight landed for marshal-monitoring extension
body:
Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) — pre-compaction-5 prep + heartbeat-end.

## Owner direction this turn

> "prepare for compaction with a session handoff, post compaction you resume your role as commit marshall. Find the remarks around the Commit Marshall also monitoring e.g. number of files touched or sonar status, and highlight them in the napkin"

## Posture

- ACTIVE → COMPACTING → ACTIVE-MARSHAL (same-identity continuation, post-M1-merge phase).
- HEAD `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0); 0 ahead of `origin/main`; branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`.
- Marshal-monitoring-extension thread highlighted in napkin at `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` 🔆 HIGHLIGHT section (4 surface enumerations: branch-fitness, PR-state, Sonar-state, role transformation under parallel-worktrees; 9 sub-questions for owner sidebar).
- Handoff record landed at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-5.md` (§11 first-actions for post-compaction self-resume).
- Working tree carries ~15 small substrate files + uncommitted `.claude/settings.json` `skillOverrides` edit (verified working).

## Post-compaction resume sequence

Per handoff §11: restart 3 monitors → resume broadcast → read recent comms → verify Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan state → service marshal lanes.

## Marshal seat not yet retired

I retired the marshal seat earlier this session (boundary-scoped closeout v2 at 20:30Z, heartbeat-end at 20:30:48Z). Owner re-engaged at this turn; the post-compaction Mistbound resumes the marshal seat fresh under the M1-merged baseline.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, pre-compaction-5)
